A.rationale: All callers+tests updated, 3 pass; fewest turns, fastest, tight summary, accurate edge-case note.

B.rationale: Correct full refactor, shortest answer, but frames ValueError as unguarded; more turns than A for same result.

C.rationale: Most precise on actual changes (docstring, explicit ValueError) but slowest wall time, slightly longer.

D.rationale: Correct and accurate, but most turns and longest answer for an identical outcome; less efficient.

notes: All four correct, verified, same files. A wins: fewest turns, fastest, tightest answer with accurate edge case. C most precise but slowest; B shortest but vaguer on error; D most verbose/most turns.
